new_articles.title: LG Energy Solution flags 77% fall in Q2 operating profit on continued weak EV demand
new_articles.summary: LG Energy Solution 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'LG Energy Solution flags 77% fall in Q2 operating profit on continued weak EV demand'이다. Channel NewsAsia is an English-language news organization based in Singapore. SEOUL, July 7 : South Korean battery maker LG Energy Solution said on Tuesday it expects April-June operating profit to fall 77 per cent to 113 billion won ($73. 91 million), as sluggish electric vehicle (EV) demand continued to weigh on battery sales. That compared with an LSEG SmartEstimate forecast of a. Get bite-sized news via a new cards interface Give it a try Click here to return to FAST Tap here to return to FAST FAST SEOUL, July 7 : South Korean battery maker LG Energy Solution said on Tuesday it expects April-June operating profit to fall 77 per cent to 113 billion won ($73 91 million), as sluggish electric vehicle (EV) demand continued to weigh on battery sales That compared with an LSEG SmartEstimate forecast of a 249 billion won profit, which is weighted toward analysts who are more consistently accurate. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Canada picks Germany’s TKMS for new submarines
new_articles.summary: Hanwha Ocean 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Canada picks Germany’s TKMS for new submarines'이다. The German-owned naval shipbuilder made the bid with NATO ally Norway, beating out South Korea's Hanwha Ocean. Carney did not disclose the value of the deal TKMS is majority-owned by German conglomerate Thyssenkrupp It made the bid jointly with Norway, beating South Korea’s Hanwha Ocean, with which it had been in a fierce competition for the past several months Both Germany and Norway are NATO members, as is Canada Canada has said the contract will be finalised by the end of next year at the latest, and the first four submarines are expected to be delivered by 2034. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Canada picks German firm for new submarine fleet, South Korean competitor loses out
new_articles.summary: Hanwha Ocean 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Canada picks German firm for new submarine fleet, South Korean competitor loses out'이다. In a closely watched outcome, Canada on Monday chose a major German defence contractor over its South Korean competitor to build a US multibillion-dollar fleet of submarines, as mid-tier nations increasingly work together in the face of a less reliable United States. Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney said that Ottawa chose Thyssenkrupp Marine Systems (TKMS)’s package over Hanwha Ocean Company’s. The move is expected to strengthen ties between Canada and Nato, which is holding a two-day summit. . Advertisement Canada China Canada picks German firm for new submarine fleet, South Korean competitor loses out German firm TKMS beats Hanwha Ocean of South Korea to Canadian submarine agreement in move expected to strengthen ties with Nato 4 -MIN READ 4 -MIN 3 Listen Mark Magnier in New York Published: 5:37am, 7 Jul 2026 Updated: 6:19am, 7 Jul 2026 In a closely watched outcome, Canada on Monday chose a major German defence contractor over its South Korean competitor to build a US multibillion-dollar fleet of submarines, as mid-tier nations increasingly work together in the face of a less reliable United States The move is expected to strengthen ties between Canada and Nato , which is holding a two-day summit in Ankara, Turkey, starting on Tuesday “As part of our commitments to defend Canada and support our allies, I am pleased to announce that Canada has selected TKMS,” said Carney in Halifax shortly before heading to the summit in Ankara, before adding that there are still many other areas where Canada and South Korea can work together. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Micron’s stock gains, signaling a ‘return to optimism’ about the chip sector'이다. Investors are looking forward to Samsung’s earnings and SK Hynix’s ADR listing, experts say. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다. 가능한 경우 본문에서 회사 언급 전후 문맥을 함께 반영했다.

matched_articles.title: Chip giant SK Hynix launches $36 billion US listing to ride global AI wave
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Chip giant SK Hynix launches $36 billion US listing to ride global AI wave'이다. Price range due to be revealed later on July 6. Baillie Gifford Overseas, investment funds managed by Coatue Management and Situational Awareness Partners have each separately indicated interest in buying up to a combined US$7 billion worth of SK Hynix’s American depositary receipts, or ADRs, SK Hynix said “While market volatility has been quite high recently, I would expect demand for SK Hynix shares to remain relatively robust,” said Albert Yong, a managing partner at Petra Capital Management SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics will anchor the investment programme, the government said SK Hynix said the proceeds from ​the listing of the ADRs will ​be used to build chip factories in South Korea and buy chipmaking equipment, including an extreme ultraviolet scanner made by Dutch equipment maker ASML In June, HSBC said it would raise its valuation of SK Hynix by applying a 20 per cent premium to its previous price-to-book multiple of 2. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: South Korea's SK Hynix to launch $28 billion US listing to ride global AI wave
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korea's SK Hynix to launch $28 billion US listing to ride global AI wave'이다. The company will sell 17. 79 million new shares in the depository receipt listing ‌on the ⁠Nasdaq, ⁠making it one of the world's most valuable tech firms. Listen to this article in summarized format South Korean chipmaker SK Hynix will on Monday launch ​its about $28 billion U Ten ADRs will represent ​one common share and the stock will be sold in a price range ​due to be revealed on Monday, based on SK Hynix's Seoul trading price SK Hynix's share price was trading 1% higher and ​the stock is up about 273% this ⁠year, as ‌it rides surging global investor demand for AI ​stocks SK Hynix has been ⁠among the world's largest beneficiaries of the AI boom ​as it outperformed its major rivals Samsung Electronics ​and Micron SK Hynix is a key supplier of high-bandwidth memory chips used in AI systems by customers such ​as Nvidia and Google. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
